full_text:
Qiao Mao (Yuanwei) 喬瑁 (元偉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qiao Mao (喬瑁), styledYuanwei (元偉), was born in Liang. Forged decree against Dong Zhuo. Was killed by his enemy Liu Dai. Qiao Mao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
